body:
Content:
- Small formatting changes for all tests (`@info`)
- Performance tests for CLOUD nucleation parameterizations
- Updated readme to include `dev .` for a local CloudMicrophysics version.
- Updated CLIMAParameters to obtain necessary parameters
- Included `Nucleation.jl` in the package, added nucleation unit tests to `runtests.jl`

TODO:
- GPU tests - I'm not sure how to write meaningful GPU tests yet.
title: Add performance and GPU tests for MAM nucleation module
